tagline: Argentine pastries, breads, and empanadas — baked fresh in Burbank.

hero.heading: From Buenos Aires, with love.
hero.subheading: Hand-rolled empanadas, dulce de leche pastries, and crusty French breads — baked fresh every morning in Burbank since the family opened the doors.

about.heading: 220 reviews. 4.5 stars. A pinch of Argentina on Verdugo Ave.
paragraphs: We bake the way our abuela taught us — slow rises, butter that smells like butter, and pastries you'd find on a Sunday morning in Recoleta.
Stop in for an empanada and a café cortado, grab a loaf for the table, or order a tray of medialunas for the office. We're open six days, and the line moves fast.

services.title: Empanadas
services.description: Beef, chicken, ham & cheese, spinach, and more. Hand-folded, baked to order.

services.title: Argentine Pastries
services.description: Medialunas, alfajores, vigilantes, and pastel de hojaldre con dulce de leche.

services.title: Fresh Breads
services.description: French baguettes, pan miga, brioche, and rustic country loaves — baked every morning.

services.title: Sandwiches
services.description: Argentine-style chivito, jamón y queso on our own bread, and weekday specials.

services.title: Espresso Bar
services.description: Espresso, café con leche, submarinos. Real Argentine café service.

services.title: Catering Trays
services.description: Empanada trays, pastry platters, and bread baskets for offices and parties.

reviews.name: Ana C.
reviews.text: These empanadas are the real deal. Reminds me of home in Buenos Aires. The medialunas alone are worth the drive.

reviews.name: Roberto S.
reviews.text: Family-run, fresh every day, and the dulce de leche pastries are unbelievable. The owner remembers everyone.

reviews.name: Erin H.
reviews.text: I drive across town for the bread. The chivito sandwich is also worth it. Hidden gem of Burbank.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: New Buenos Aires Bakery & Cafe, 1723 W Verdugo Ave, Burbank, CA

seo.title: New Buenos Aires Bakery & Cafe — Argentine Bakery in Burbank, CA
seo.description: Hand-folded empanadas, dulce de leche pastries, fresh breads, and espresso in Burbank. Open Monday–Saturday. Catering available.
